reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, nos hicimos socios y contratamos el seguro del auto con ellos, y tienen muchas opciones para disfrutar, en vacaciones y durante el año. Cómo en el recreo en la isla del Tigre

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. We became members and purchased car insurance with them. They have many options to enjoy, both on vacation and throughout the year. Like the recreation on Tigre Island.

reviews.comment:
Es amplia y cómoda. Lamentablemente no te dejan dejar el auto estacionado por algunos minutos para hacer una compra ni siquiera siendo socio del ACA. Está muy bien armada la estación con varios lugares y cómodos accesos.

(Translated by Google)
It's spacious and comfortable. Unfortunately, they don't allow you to leave your car parked for a few minutes to make a purchase, even if you're an ACA member. The station is very well laid out with several parking spaces and easy access.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMjdxdVBnEAE
